'''thajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobleite|nobleite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobleite|nobleite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæjichith|thæjichith]] || [[word:thæjichij|thæjichij]] || [[word:thæjichish|thæjichish]] || [[word:thæjichi|thæjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thajujuchuth|thajujuchuth]] || [[word:thajujuchuj|thajujuchuj]] || [[word:thajujuchush|thajujuchush]] || [[word:thajujuchu|thajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajuchuth|thajuchuth]] || [[word:thajuchuj|thajuchuj]] || [[word:thajuchush|thajuchush]] || [[word:thajuchu|thajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajufchuth|thajufchuth]] || [[word:thajufchuj|thajufchuj]] || [[word:thajufchush|thajufchush]] || [[word:thajufchuf|thajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thajuchuthu|thajuchuthu]] || [[word:thajuchuju|thajuchuju]] || [[word:thajuchushu|thajuchushu]] || [[word:thajuchuku|thajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thajuchuth|thajuchuth]] || [[word:thajuchuj|thajuchuj]] || [[word:thajuchush|thajuchush]] || [[word:thajuchu|thajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thajuchuthul|thajuchuthul]] || [[word:thajuchujul|thajuchujul]] || [[word:thajuchushul|thajuchushul]] || [[word:thajuchukul|thajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thajuchuthuthu|thajuchuthuthu]] || [[word:thajuchujuju|thajuchujuju]] || [[word:thajuchushushu|thajuchushushu]] || [[word:thajuchuku|thajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thajuchuthun|thajuchuthun]] || [[word:thajuchujun|thajuchujun]] || [[word:thajuchushun|thajuchushun]] || [[word:thajuchukun|thajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thajuchuthuoro|thajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:thajuchujuoro|thajuchujuoro]] || [[word:thajuchushuoro|thajuchushuoro]] || [[word:thajuchukuoro|thajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
